content:
## Changes

### New Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `src/agents/restructure/mod.rs` | RestructureAgent, RestructureAgentBuilder, TypedAgent impl |
| `src/agents/restructure/types.rs` | RestructureInput, RestructureOutput, Question, StructuredIssue |
| `src/spec_store.rs` | SpecStore trait, SpecRef struct |
| `prompts/restructure.md` | System prompt template (loaded via include_str!) |

### Modified Files

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/agents/mod.rs` | Add `pub mod restructure;` + export TypedAgent trait |
| `src/lib.rs` | Add `pub mod spec_store;` + re-export RestructureAgent |

### New Trait

```rust
// src/agents/mod.rs
#[async_trait]
pub trait TypedAgent<I, O>: Send + Sync
where
    I: Serialize + DeserializeOwned + Send + Sync,
    O: Serialize + DeserializeOwned + Send + Sync,
{
    async fn run(&self, input: I) -> NovaResult<O>;
    fn name(&self) -> &str;
}
```

### Internal Pipeline (all in one LLM call)

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Input: intent + clarifications] --> B[Assemble prompt]
    B --> C[SpecStore.search]
    C --> D[SpecStore.read relevant specs]
    D --> E[Build system prompt + user message]
    E --> F[complete_structured with JSON Schema]
    F --> G{LLM output type}
    G -->|need_clarification| H[Return questions]
    G -->|create_issues| I[Return structured issues]
```

### Test Plan

| Test | Type | Validates |
|------|------|-----------|
| Mock LLM returns need_clarification | Unit | Output parsing, question structure |
| Mock LLM returns create_issues | Unit | Issue structure, depends_on, AC |
| Mock SpecStore returns relevant specs | Unit | Prompt assembly includes spec context |
| Mock SpecStore returns empty | Unit | Agent works without specs (asks more questions) |
| Real LLM with sample intent | Integration | End-to-end prompt quality |
